channel.title: Cointelegraph.com News
channel.description: Cointelegraph covers fintech, blockchain and Bitcoin bringing you the latest crypto news and analyses on the future of money.

image.title: Cointelegraph.com News
image.description: Cointelegraph covers fintech, blockchain and Bitcoin bringing you the latest crypto news and analyses on the future of money.

item.title: Senator Lummis says China will 'write the rules' of the new financial era if CLARITY fails
item.description: The Senate Banking Committee voted to advance the CLARITY Act in May, but it must still pass both chambers of Congress before heading to the president's desk.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Vince Quill

item.title: Circle freezes $12.6M of USDC linked to privacy protocol Zama
item.description: The $12.6 million in USDC was likely frozen in connection with an ongoing but unrelated civil court case, according to onchain sleuth ZachXBT.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Vince Quill

item.title: SEC charges Texas man with $12.3M crypto fraud using fake AI trading bots
item.description: The SEC charged Texas man Nathan Fuller with raising $12.3 million from 150 investors through a crypto fraud scheme built around fake AI trading bots.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Amin Haqshanas

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Cointelegraph

item.title: Spot Bitcoin ETFs see record 10-day outflow streak, analyst calls it ‘contrarian indicator’
item.description: Spot Bitcoin ETFs logged a record 10-day outflow streak totaling nearly $3 billion, while Ether ETFs bled for 14 consecutive sessions.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Amin Haqshanas

item.title: Bitcoin treasury space still has fair share of ‘carnival barkers’: BSTR founder
item.description: BSTR co-founder Sean Bill says many Bitcoin treasury companies lack the “ability to actually deploy Bitcoin.”
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Ciaran Lyons

item.title: US has seized nearly $1 billion in Iranian crypto, Treasury secretary says
item.description: US Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said the US has seized roughly $1 billion in Iranian crypto assets, double the figure disclosed in late April.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Amin Haqshanas

item.title: Bitcoin retail sentiment still matters, says Swan Bitcoin CEO
item.description: Swan Bitcoin CEO Cory Klippsten said it is important to pay attention to retail sentiment around Bitcoin, as ownership is still far from concentrated and “it’s not like Blackrock owns the Bitcoin.”
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Ciaran Lyons

item.title: Bitcoin dip buyers place $500M in bids as $70K retest looms
item.description: Over $500 million in Bitcoin bids now sit near $70,000, while options traders and futures positions converge around the same level.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Biraajmaan Tamuly

item.title: ‘Extraordinarily unusual’ for CFTC to reverse Gemini settlement deal: Ex-chair
item.description: As the CFTC and Gemini work together to seek a court's reversal of a 2025 settlement, one of the agency’s former chairs said the public “deserves a better explanation.”
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Turner Wright

item.title: CFTC backs crypto perpetual contracts, issues advisory on 24/7 trading
item.description: The CFTC issued notices affecting platforms seeking to offer cryptocurrency perpetual futures contracts, including a no-action position for Coinbase and approval for Kalshi.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Turner Wright

item.title: Sui network temporarily stalls again after Thursday's outage
item.description: The outage was caused by the same network update software bug that disrupted the protocol on Thursday, which resulted in nearly six hours of downtime.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Vince Quill

item.title: Coinbase brings global crypto derivatives markets to US institutional clients
item.description: The exchange's integration with Deribit gives eligible US institutional investors access to global crypto options and perpetual futures markets.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Nate Kostar

item.title: Bitcoin plums new six-week lows as analyst eyes BTC price dip 'end' at $72K
item.description: Bitcoin saw its lowest levels since the middle of April as BTC price action continued ot diverge from thriving US stock markets.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by William Suberg

item.title: Ex-Celsius CEO files motion to vacate sentence after lawyers withdraw
item.description: Former CEO Alex Mashinsky filed documents seeking to vacate his 12-year sentence, which included claims involving FTX and a “hostile takeover” by a former Celsius executive, who was sentenced to time served.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Turner Wright

item.title: Ethereum analysts say ‘downside pressure’ remains as $1.8K becomes key
item.description: Analysts warn Ether’s downside risks remain elevated as traders closely watch the $1,800 support zone for stability.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Nancy Lubale

item.title: Bitcoin ETFs bleed $2.8B in record nine-day outflow streak
item.description: Spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded a nine-day outflow streak totaling $2.84 billion, surpassing an eight-session outflow run in February 2025.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Helen Partz

item.title: Why is Stellar's XLM up by over 50% this week?
item.description: XLM rallied after US financial giant DTCC announced a partnership with the Stellar Network, but it still risks a sharp downside in the coming weeks.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Yashu Gola

item.title: NYSE parent ICE pushes ‘level playing field’ for 24/7 onchain perps
item.description: ICE’s CEO said regulators need to create a “level playing field” for launching 24/7 onchain perps contracts, which are already trading on exchanges such as Hyperliquid.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Zoltan Vardai

item.title: Bitcoin falls out of the global top 10 assets as market cap dips below $1.5T
item.description: Bitcoin’s market cap has dropped below $1.5 trillion, pushing it out of the world’s top 10 assets amid AI stock and precious metal rallies.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Nancy Lubale

item.title: Strategy situation ‘out of hand,’ says Arca exec on $15B preferred stock burden
item.description: Strategy’s capital structure may be under pressure as Arca’s Jeff Dorman highlights $15 billion in preferred stock obligations and CEO comments on possible Bitcoin sales.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Helen Partz

item.title: Texas Bitcoin reserve plans shift from ETF to direct BTC custody
item.description: Texas is hiring a crypto custodian to move its $10 million Strategic Bitcoin Reserve from BlackRock’s IBIT ETF into directly held coins and build full state‑level BTC plumbing.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Christina Comben

item.title: DxSale drained for $7.3M in BNB Chain liquidity exploit
item.description: DxSale was drained for about $7.3 million from BNB Chain liquidity providers, raising fresh concerns over old DeFi locker contracts.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Zoltan Vardai

item.title: OKX Ventures, Korea Investment & Securities to buy 19.6% Coinone stake for $106M
item.description: OKX Ventures and KIS to invest $53 million each for a 19.6% stake in Coinone, deepening ties between traditional finance and crypto in South Korea’s tightly regulated market.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Christina Comben

item.title: SEC approves Paxos as ‘blockchain-native’ clearing agency
item.description: Paxos says its approval as a blockchain-focused clearing agency represents a “critical piece of financial market infrastructure” as Wall Street becomes more interested in crypto.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Martin Young

item.title: Bitcoin’s major holders halt buys as demand slows: CryptoQuant
item.description: CryptoQuant says that the holding structure for large Bitcoin holders is deteriorating, a trend that has historically preceded “sustained price weakness.”
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Martin Young

item.title: Sui Network back online after ‘crash bug’ causes 6-hour outage
item.description: The Sui mainnet has resumed after a bug in a network update took it offline for 5 hours and 55 minutes.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Stephen Katte

item.title: Bitcoin’s trapped under $74K while $9B options expiry looms: Are bears back in control?
item.description: Bears hold the upper hand for Friday's $9 billion options expiry, keeping Bitcoin under pressure amid heavy ETF outflows and corporate selling
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Marcel Pechman

item.title: Buy $72K dip, or jump ship: What will Bitcoin bulls do?
item.description: Investors selling across spot, futures and ETF markets pushed Bitcoin into its monthly range lows near $72,000 but data shows retail investors buying the dip and opening longs.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Antonio Oliveira

item.title: Gemini taps Grok for personalized AI-powered prediction market feeds
item.description: Gemini is leaning into AI features for its prediction market, following other crypto exchanges in moving beyond crypto trading amid a market slump.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Brayden Lindrea
